# AUTO-GENERATED scripted_guis — do not edit by hand
# One triplet per innovation key

# innovation_battlements
DI_remove_innovation_battlements = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			remove_innovation = innovation_battlements
		}
	}
}

DI_add_innovation_battlements = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_battlements
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_battlements = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_battlements
	}
}

	}

}

	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_primogeniture
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_primogeniture = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_primogeniture
	}
}

	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			remove_innovation = innovation_lords_of_the_westlands
		}
	}
}

DI_add_innovation_lords_of_the_westlands = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_lords_of_the_westlands
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_lords_of_the_westlands = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_lords_of_the_westlands
	}
}

	}
}

DI_add_innovation_geshani_warfare = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_geshani_warfare
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_geshani_warfare = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_geshani_warfare
	}
}

	}
}

# innovation_honin_warfare
DI_remove_innovation_honin_warfare = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			remove_innovation = innovation_honin_warfare
		}
	}
}

DI_add_innovation_honin_warfare = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_honin_warfare
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_honin_warfare = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_honin_warfare
	}
}

	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_fire_medicine = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_fire_medicine
	}
}

# innovation_champa_rice
DI_remove_innovation_champa_rice = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			remove_innovation = innovation_champa_rice
		}
	}
}

DI_add_innovation_champa_rice = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_champa_rice
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_champa_rice = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_champa_rice
	}
}
